items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 15 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「Poolside's Laguna S 2.1 is a small open-weight coding model that punches well above its size」、「Nvidia bets physical AI can solve healthcare robotics’ data problem」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: Differentiable Logic Gate Networks for Low-Latency EEG Classification on Edge Devices
items.summary: Real-time EEG classification on edge devices is bottlenecked by the floating-point arithmetic of conventional neural networks. We investigated Differentiable Logic Gate Networks (Diff-Logic) as a hardware-native alternative that compiles models into pure Boolean circuits executa…

items.title: Moving Alphabet: A Controlled Study of Training Data for Text-to-Video Generation
